title: Tessmanniophoenix chuco
taxonomy: Tessmanniophoenix chuco is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and is considered to be an endangered species. Tessmanniophoenix chuco is a member of the genus Tessmanniophoenix, which is a small group of palms. The classification of Tessmanniophoenix chuco is further divided into its kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Angiospermophyta), and class (Liliopsida). This plant is of great interest to botanists due to its unique characteristics and limited geographical distribution.
